rationale: twoweeks has explicit page classes, retrieval order, and archive separation; Karpathy is intentionally minimal.
twoweeks has create/update/supersede rules plus mandatory index/log; Karpathy does not define mutation workflows.
Karpathy explicitly surfaces assumptions and multiple interpretations; twoweeks is workflow-first, not ambiguity-first.
Karpathy explicitly penalizes speculative abstraction and unnecessary complexity.
Karpathy strongly forbids drive-by refactors; twoweeks only partially implies this through canonical-page rules.
Karpathy centers verifiable success criteria; twoweeks has workflows but weaker explicit verification language.
twoweeks is more deterministic for ingest/update/lint/save-output flows.
Karpathy includes an examples file; twoweeks baseline lacks one.
Karpathy ships reusable plugin metadata and a skill package.
Karpathy names what good behavior should look like; hybrid adds explicit verify contracts and scripts.
